## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue
- Closes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Validation
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all-targets --all-features`

## Checklist
- [ ] I kept modules simple and focused.
- [ ] I avoided unnecessary abstraction.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs/readme when needed.
